## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, keys, tokens, logs, or database dumps are included.
- [ ] File paths are validated before privileged operations.
- [ ] No unsafe broad permission fixes such as `chmod -R 777` were added.
- [ ] User-facing privileged actions go through the execution API boundary.
